message:
feat(packs): add dns.cloudflare and remote.rsync packs

Introduces two new pack categories with comprehensive protection:

## dns.cloudflare Pack
Protects against destructive Cloudflare DNS operations:
- `wrangler dns-records delete` - DNS record deletion via Wrangler CLI
- Cloudflare API DELETE requests to /dns_records/{id} and /zones/{id}
- Terraform destroy targeting cloudflare_record resources

Safe patterns allow read-only operations:
- `wrangler dns-records list` - listing DNS records
- `wrangler whoami` - identity verification
- `curl -X GET api.cloudflare.com` - read-only API calls

## remote.rsync Pack
Protects against destructive rsync file synchronization:
- `rsync --delete` and all variants (--delete-before, --delete-excluded, etc.)
- `rsync --del` - short alias for --delete

Safe patterns preserve preview functionality:
- `rsync --dry-run` or `-n` flag - preview mode
- `rsync --list-only` - listing without transfer
- Dry-run with delete flags (safe preview of destructive operation)

## Pack Registration Updates
- Added `dns` and `remote` module declarations
- Registered dns.cloudflare at tier 4 (cloud/dns/platform tier)
- Registered remote.rsync at tier 1 (core/storage/remote tier)
- Updated PACK_ENTRIES count from 48 to 50
- Simplified storage.s3 keywords for consistency
- Added comprehensive tests for both packs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
